title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 89.490 - Violation — penalty
text:
89.490.  Violation — penalty. — Any person violating the provisions of sections 89.300 to 89.490 is guilty of a misdemeanor and upon conviction thereof shall be fined not less than one hundred dollars nor more than five hundred dollars, or by confinement in the county jail for not more than one year, or by both such fine and confinement.
(L. 1963 p. 146 § 21)
